languages.text: "Я обратила внимание, что ваши рядовые слуги привыкли жаловаться на жизнь. Грязь, голод, одна койка на несколько человек... Ваши солдаты спрашивают, будут ли у них такие же удобства, как у остального экипажа?"

"I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"
languages.original_text: "Я обратила внимание, что ваши рядовые слуги привыкли жаловаться на жизнь. Грязь, голод, одна койка на несколько человек... Ваши солдаты спрашивают, будут ли у них такие же удобства, как у остального экипажа?"

traits.locale_text: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

"I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"
"I... ah... noticed the conditions in which ordinary workers and crew members live. In filth and hunger, and crammed into bunks with several others..."

"I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

"I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

languages.text: 「私は…ああ…普通の人たちや乗組員が暮らす状況に気づいた。汚い場所で、腹を空かせ、何人かで狭い寝台に押し込められている…」
languages.original_text: "I... ah... noticed the conditions in which ordinary workers and crew members live. In filth and hunger, and crammed into bunks with several others..."

languages.text: "Sıradan hizmetkârlarınızın hayatlarından şikâyet etmeye düşkün olduklarını fark ettim. Pislik, açlık, birkaç kişinin aynı ranzayı paylaşması... Askerlerim de mürettebatın geri kalanıyla aynı yaşam koşullarını bekleyip bekleyemeyeceklerini soruyor."
languages.original_text: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

traits.locale_text: "Sıradan hizmetkârlarınızın hayatlarından şikâyet etmeye düşkün olduklarını fark ettim. Pislik, açlık, birkaç kişinin aynı ranzayı paylaşması... Askerlerim de mürettebatın geri kalanıyla aynı yaşam koşullarını bekleyip bekleyemeyeceklerini soruyor."

languages.text: “我注意到您的普通仆从时常抱怨他们的生活。肮脏、饥饿、好几个人挤一张铺位……我的士兵们都在问，他们是否会拥有和其他船员一样的生活条件。”
languages.original_text: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

traits.locale_text: “我注意到您的普通仆从时常抱怨他们的生活。肮脏、饥饿、好几个人挤一张铺位……我的士兵们都在问，他们是否会拥有和其他船员一样的生活条件。”

languages.text: "Mir ist aufgefallen, dass sich Eure einfachen Diener gerne über ihr Leben beschweren. Der Schmutz, der Hunger, eine Koje für mehrere Leute ... Meine Soldaten wüssten gerne, ob sie dieselben Lebensbedingungen erwarten wie den Rest der Crew."
languages.original_text: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

traits.locale_text: "Mir ist aufgefallen, dass sich Eure einfachen Diener gerne über ihr Leben beschweren. Der Schmutz, der Hunger, eine Koje für mehrere Leute ... Meine Soldaten wüssten gerne, ob sie dieselben Lebensbedingungen erwarten wie den Rest der Crew."

languages.text: « Vos serviteurs se plaignent souvent de leurs conditions de vie, vous savez. Ils vivent dans la crasse, entassés dans des couchettes et ils meurent de faim... Mes soldats se demandent s'ils vivront comme le reste de l'équipage. »
languages.original_text: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

traits.locale_text: « Vos serviteurs se plaignent souvent de leurs conditions de vie, vous savez. Ils vivent dans la crasse, entassés dans des couchettes et ils meurent de faim... Mes soldats se demandent s'ils vivront comme le reste de l'équipage. »

languages.text: «Me he percatado de que sus sirvientes corrientes tienden a quejarse sobre sus vidas. La suciedad, el hambre, compartir un solo catre entre varias personas... Mis soldados preguntan si deben esperar las mismas condiciones que el resto de la tripulación».
languages.original_text: "I've noticed that your common servants are fond of complaining about their lives. The filth, the hunger, sharing a single bunk between several people... My soldiers are asking if they can expect the same living conditions as the rest of the crew?"

traits.locale_text: «Me he percatado de que sus sirvientes corrientes tienden a quejarse sobre sus vidas. La suciedad, el hambre, compartir un solo catre entre varias personas... Mis soldados preguntan si deben esperar las mismas condiciones que el resto de la tripulación».
